overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections with futuristic traffic, and passes under overpasses in a dense cyberpunk urban environment with wet reflective pavement and towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements.

events.description: futuristic sports car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a multi-lane street, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic red sports car driving down the wet street

entered.detail: large glowing cyan pharmaceutical company sign on building facade
multiple hovering holographic advertisement screens between buildings
multi-lane street with reflective wet surface showing neon reflections
tall glass and steel towers with illuminated windows rising in the background
illuminated walk sign on pole at intersection approach

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk in downtown Night City, with a glowing pharmaceuticals sign on the right and futuristic skyscrapers ahead. A red sports car drives past on the multi-lane street to the left as the character approaches an intersection with floating digital billboards overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: large illuminated intersection with yellow crosswalk

events.description: steps off sidewalk and enters wide intersection crosswalk
futuristic teal sports car passes through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection via yellow-striped crosswalk while observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: sleek teal sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing covering the intersection
large illuminated cola advertisement sign on building
suspended traffic signals above the crossing

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide illuminated intersection over yellow crosswalk stripes, with a teal sports car passing through. The neon cola sign becomes visible on the left as the character moves through the open intersection space surrounded by towering buildings.

scattered debris and trash along the sidewalk edge
dark building facade creating covered walkway effect

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrower sidewalk section with blue vending machines and scattered litter on the left, under the shadow of building overhangs. The character follows a pedestrian ahead while futuristic billboards remain visible overhead between the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing with white zebra stripes and moving traffic

events.description: waits for and crosses street with white crosswalk markings as cars pass by
turns slightly right to follow sidewalk along new street section

agents.ego_description: crossing another street via white-striped crosswalk, then continuing along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black SUV and red car driving along the street

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing with white parallel lines
large vertical digital billboards displaying advertisements on building facades
palm trees in planters along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a street marked with white zebra stripes, navigating between moving vehicles including a black SUV. Upon reaching the other side, the character walks along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and large neon advertising screens on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with building columns

events.description: enters covered area under concrete overpass with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under the cover of an overpass with darker lighting and building columns on the right

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass ceiling and support beams overhead
tall dark support columns of adjacent building creating corridor effect
glowing signage attached to building walls under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Walking under a concrete overpass that creates a semi-covered corridor with darker lighting. The space is defined by massive support columns on the right and neon wall signs, while the street remains visible to the left with sparse traffic passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with planters and small illuminated shrine structure

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open sidewalk with greenery and planters

agents.ego_description: walking along an open sidewalk lined with concrete planters and greenery, approaching a small illuminated structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead near the illuminated structure

entered.detail: large rectangular planters with dense green plants and palm trees
small booth or shrine with warm yellow lighting at the corner ahead
towering glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the character walks along a sidewalk bordered by concrete planters with lush greenery on the right. The character approaches a small illuminated booth or shrine at the corner, with towering skyscrapers visible ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the neon-drenched streets of downtown Night City, transitioning from wide, illuminated intersections to the shadowed corridors of urban overpasses. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk beside a glowing pharmaceuticals sign, moving past a red sports car toward a wide intersection filled with floating digital billboards and yellow crosswalk stripes. As the character crosses the street and passes a neon cola sign, the environment shifts into a narrower pedestrian path lined with blue vending machines and litter before crossing another street amidst moving black SUVs. The scene then moves into the dim, semi-covered space beneath a concrete overpass defined by massive support columns and neon wall signs. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into a brighter area bordered by lush greenery in concrete planters, ending as the character approaches an illuminated booth with towering skyscrapers looming in the distance.
